overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character walking through a misty pine forest at dusk. The character passes an abandoned white SUV and dilapidated wooden structures before approaching a stop sign at a forest road intersection.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, scanning the surroundings cautiously

notable_agents.action: abandoned white SUV stationary on the left side of the path, partially obscured by mist

narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with patches of gravel
white abandoned SUV parked on the left side of the path, partially visible through the mist
dense shrubs and ferns lining the sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense, misty pine forest at dusk along a narrow dirt trail. An abandoned white SUV becomes visible through the fog on the left side of the path as the character approaches.

dilapidated wooden building or shed behind the fence on the right

segments.scene_description: The character passes the abandoned white SUV and continues along the trail, passing a weathered wooden fence and dilapidated structure on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall pines

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the forest along the winding dirt path surrounded by tall pines

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the dense forest, leaving the wooden structures behind. The path winds through tall pine trees with mist hanging between the trunks.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest road intersection with stop sign

events.description: red stop sign becomes visible ahead at the forest intersection
red barrier lights or tape visible across the road ahead indicating a blockade

agents.ego_description: approaching the stop sign and intersection, slowing slightly as the path opens up

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign with white lettering positioned at the intersection ahead
wooden utility pole with wires running along the left side of the path
red and white barrier or warning lights blocking the road ahead at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a forest intersection where a red stop sign and barrier gate become visible ahead. Utility poles line the left side as the path opens into a wider clearing with a road blockade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a claustrophobic, misty pine forest that gradually opens into a blocked road intersection. It begins with the character navigating a narrow dirt trail at dusk, where an abandoned white SUV slowly emerges from the dense fog on the left. As the character passes the vehicle, the scene shifts toward a weathered wooden fence and a dilapidated structure lining the right side of the path. The camera then follows the character deeper into the woods, winding through towering pines and hanging mist before the terrain begins to widen. Finally, the forest opens into a clearing where utility poles line the way, leading directly toward a red stop sign and a barrier gate blocking the road.
